description: You are a biochemist quantifying protein expression levels from a polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis (PAGE) image located at ~/Fiji_Data/raw/gel/protein_gel.tif. Quantify the band intensities for all lanes, applying background subtraction and using Lane 1 as the reference/loading control. Calculate the normalized intensity for each lane as a ratio relative to Lane 1. Save the quantification results including lane ID, raw intensity, normalized intensity, background intensity, and peak area percentage to ~/Fiji_Data/results/gel/band_quantification.csv. Save the lane intensity profile plots to ~/Fiji_Data/results/gel/lane_profiles.png. Generate a summary report at ~/Fiji_Data/results/gel/densitometry_report.txt that identifies the lanes with the highest and lowest expression relative to Lane 1 and lists all normalized values.

metadata.dataset: ImageJ sample gel electrophoresis image (real laboratory gel)
